title: Coal Lucky Block
description: A Coal Lucky Block With Custom Items!
body:
> **The Coal Lucky Block mod Adds:**
> - A new Coal Toolset
> - New Coal Armor
> - Coal Greatsword
> - Coal Scythe
> - A Coal Lucky Block
> - A Coal Apple
> - A Coal Potion
> - A New Bleeding Effect
> 
> **How to get started:**
> You can craft a Coal Lucky Block with 4 coal and a chest (Full Recipe in Gallery)
> Or You can find it rarely generating in caves or on mountains!
> 
> **How to get the custom items:**
> To get all the mods new Items you have to break
> The Coal Lucky Block and it drops vanilla or new Custom Items!
>
> **Credits:**
> - If you use this mod in a modpack please Credit me!
>
